title: RestTimerPersistedStateV1
description: Client-only localStorage payload for workout session and rest timer (v1).

sessionStartedAt.description: Epoch ms when this sessionId was created; stable ordering key for this workout

updatedAt.description: Epoch ms last persisted; bump on every save

restEndsAt.description: Epoch milliseconds when current rest countdown ends; present if phase is rest_running

alarmActive.description: True when rest completed and user must acknowledge Done

restRunLog.description: Finished rest legs, chronological by startedAt; append on each completed or cancelled rest

startedAt.description: Epoch ms when this rest countdown started

endedAt.description: Epoch ms when rest ended (alarm or early stop)
